title: Aaron Sinner
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Aaron Sinner''' wrote the backstory of [[Rango Tel]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace: The Official ''Star Wars'' Fan Club]]. He also co-wrote the backstory of [[Romeo Treblanc]].

His alias is ''Master Ki-Aaron-Mundi'' on [[StarWars.com]].

==Works==
===Bibliography===
*{{DB|character|rangotel|Tel, Rango "Tank Head"}} - August [[2005]]
*{{DB|character|romeotreblanc|Treblanc, Romeo}} (co-written by [[Benjamin Christopher Norton Dawe|Benjamin Dawe]]) - September 2005
